selected_tasks.body_preview: - Graph pressure: `state_run_unmatched_non_validation_completed_count=2` — 2 sessions completed with error status but no FailureObserved events. - Assessment: `yyds state why last-failure` reports "3 error runs without FailureObserved events" and "1 incomplete run (13,938 minutes stale)." - Assessment self-tests: `yyds state doctor` confirms 107K events, SQL
selected_tasks.expected_evidence: `state_run_unmatched_non_validation_completed_count` gnome drops from 2 toward 0. `yyds state tail --limit 50` shows newly appended FailureObserved events with matching run_ids. Task lineage shows `scripts/append_terminal_state_events.py` in the changed files. Detailed description: The script `scripts/append_terminal_state_events.py` was built on Day 127 to
selected_tasks.title: Close historical state lifecycle gaps — retroactively add FailureObserved for error runs

selected_tasks.body_preview: - Graph pressure: `planner_no_task_count=1` — "The planner produced no concrete task files." - Assessment: "Day 129 (20:02) session produced zero task files — the planner found nothing to do despite a codebase with open issues and known friction points." - Log feedback lesson: "planner produced no usable task -> bound discovery and require a selected task ar
selected_tasks.expected_evidence: `planner_no_task_count` gnome drops from 1 toward 0 in subsequent sessions. Future healthy-codebase sessions produce tasks that touch src/ and pass cargo test. Task lineage shows `scripts/preseed_session_plan.py` as the changed file with a narrower non-self-referential fallback. Detailed description: The current `_healthy_codebase_fallback()` at line 955 of
selected_tasks.title: Make healthy-codebase fallback produce a src/-touching task instead of journal-only

selected_tasks.body_preview: - Issue #37: "Add held-out coding eval coverage for DeepSeek harness gnomes" — OPEN, requesting eval fixtures for FIM routing, prompt layout determinism, transport error recovery, cache behavior, and state event coverage. - Trajectory: `fitness_score=unknown` — we cannot quantify capability because no held-out coding eval fixtures generate gnome scores. - As
selected_tasks.expected_evidence: The `fitness_score` gnome moves from "unknown" toward a measurable value in future trajectory reports. `yyds eval fixtures list` shows the new fixture in the local-smoke suite. Task lineage shows the new fixture file as the changed artifact. Detailed description: The implementation agent should create a new eval fixture at `eval/fixtures/local-smoke/373-deep
selected_tasks.title: Add a coding eval fixture for DeepSeek FIM edit quality
